title: Axopupel Beauty Optimization
description: Beauty and optimization for playing on the server
body:
- The modpack of the compilation is to make a game pleasant to look at and that would be at the same time suitable for weak PCs
- There are also mods for building such as: [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom), [World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit), [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica).
And there are also mods that allow you to play with friends without creating a server. This is done by [world-host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) and [custom-lan](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-lan). They have different ways of robots that will suit everyone, for a full understanding of how it works, read information from them.
